sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Interesting changes after pressing SPACE:
1. The white block (node 7) expanded from a 2x4 at row 40 to a 4x4 spanning rows 36-40, cols 32-35. It seems to have "shot" upward and merged with the target's frame area.
2. The blue target (node 8) at rows 37-38 is still there!
3. The pink bar (node 10) shrunk from 64 to 62 pixels - this is the timer/HUD.
4. A new small charcoal node (node 11) appeared at the bottom right corner.
So SPACE seems to shoot/extend the white block upward. The white block now occupies rows 36-40. The blue target is at rows 37-38 inside this white region. Let me try SPACE again to see if it collects the target.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# White block expanded upward to rows 36-40 after SPACE
# Blue target at rows 37-38 is now inside the white block
# Try SPACE again to collect/interact with the target
action(['SPACE'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
